description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features deep, plush seat and back cushions, providing ample seating space for multiple people. Several loose throw pillows in contrasting dark gray and taupe colors are arranged along the backrest, adding both comfort and visual interest. The armrests are straight, wide, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The base and legs are not prominently visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, giving the sofa a soft, inviting appearance suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with plush cushions and contrasting throw pillows, featuring straight padded armrests and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The L-shaped sectional sofa is seen from an angle highlighting the corner and both arms, with multiple throw pillows arranged along the backrest.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the open seating area and the arrangement of cushions and pillows, showing the depth and spaciousness of the sofa.
description_view_2: The rear of the sofa is visible, displaying the continuous backrest and the subtle woven texture of the upholstery, with a glimpse of the sofa's underside.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the back, showing the full length of the backrest and the uniformity of the fabric texture, with pillows peeking over the top.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple individual seat and back cushions, all loose and uniform in size, with several loose throw pillows in contrasting colors arranged along the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a clean, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not prominently visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design, likely recessed and possibly made of wood or metal for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, high backrest with a straight profile, featuring loose back cushions for comfort and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
